name: Bonds

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Bonds 0.1.2

First public release of Bonds — links as first-class notes. Notes are atoms; the connections between them are bonds, and a bond is itself a note that carries its own content, rendered at the bottom of both endpoint notes.

### Features
- Bond notes: plain markdown with `synapse: bond` frontmatter connecting two or more atoms
- Rendered Synapses section in both endpoint notes (reading + editing mode), with native embeds, link clicks, and hover previews
- Create bonds from the command palette, editor right-click (including promoting an existing wiki-link), file explorer, or multi-file selection
- Search, sort, and expand/collapse controls styled after the core Linked mentions pane
- Bond notes hidden from graph view — atoms link directly (multi-atom bonds render as cliques)
- Bond notes filtered from Linked mentions and the backlinks pane
- Card or minimal styling, configurable bonds folder, section heading, and sort order

### Changes since 0.1.1
- Removed all explicit-any internal API access (typed structural interfaces)
- Popout window compatibility for the rendered section
- Release assets now ship with build provenance attestations
